productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Winter Blue Top
description: Composition Blue sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, with a keyhole neckline secured by a mettalic button and has cascading panels in front Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Oozing feminity, this grey top from united colors of benetton is perfect for those women who never compromise on style and comfort. The cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, while the ruffle bib adds to it a glamourous touch. Team this with denim pants or skirts and sandals for a chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
